title: Autotest.sh and part select
body:
Run with:
`autotest.sh -e -p 'prep -ifx' part_sel.v`

```
module part_sel
(
   lego0,
   lego0foo_i,
   clk,
   rst
);

   output [0:63] lego0; 
   input [0:63] lego0foo_i;

   input clk;
   input rst;

   reg [0:63] lego0_q;

   integer i0, i1, i2, i3;

   always @(posedge clk) begin
    if (rst) begin
     for (i0=0; i0<=15; i0=i0+1) begin
        lego0_q[i0] <= 0;
     end
    end
    else begin
     for (i0=0; i0<=15; i0=i0+1) begin
             lego0_q[i0] <= lego0_q[i0];
     end
    end
   end

   always @(posedge clk) begin
    if (rst) begin
     for (i1=16; i1<=31; i1=i1+1) begin
        lego0_q[i1] <= 0;
     end
    end
    else begin
     for (i1=16; i1<=31; i1=i1+1) begin
             lego0_q[i1] <= lego0_q[i1];
     end
    end
   end

   always @(posedge clk) begin
    if (rst) begin
     for (i2=32; i2<=47; i2=i2+1) begin
        lego0_q[i2] <= 0;
     end
    end
    else begin
     for (i2=32; i2<=47; i2=i2+1) begin
             lego0_q[i2] <= lego0_q[i2];
     end
    end
   end

   always @(posedge clk) begin
    if (rst) begin
     for (i3=48; i3<=63; i3=i3+1) begin
        lego0_q[i3] <= 0;
     end
    end
    else begin
     for (i3=48; i3<=63; i3=i3+1) begin
        lego0_q[i3] <= lego0foo_i[i3];
     end
    end
   end

   assign lego0  = lego0_q;

endmodule 
```
code_blocks:
module part_sel
(
   lego0,
   lego0foo_i,
   clk,
   rst
);

   output [0:63] lego0; 
   input [0:63] lego0foo_i;

   input clk;
   input rst;

   reg [0:63] lego0_q;

   integer i0, i1, i2, i3;

   always @(posedge clk) begin
    if (rst) begin
     for (i0=0; i0<=15; i0=i0+1) begin
        lego0_q[i0] <= 0;
     end
    end
    else begin
     for (i0=0; i0<=15; i0=i0+1) begin
             lego0_q[i0] <= lego0_q[i0];
     end
    end
   end

   always @(posedge clk) begin
    if (rst) begin
     for (i1=16; i1<=31; i1=i1+1) begin
        lego0_q[i1] <= 0;
     end
    end
    else begin
     for (i1=16; i1<=31; i1=i1+1) begin
             lego0_q[i1] <= lego0_q[i1];
     end
    end
   end

   always @(posedge clk) begin
    if (rst) begin
     for (i2=32; i2<=47; i2=i2+1) begin
        lego0_q[i2] <= 0;
     end
    end
    else begin
     for (i2=32; i2<=47; i2=i2+1) begin
             lego0_q[i2] <= lego0_q[i2];
     end
    end
   end

   always @(posedge clk) begin
    if (rst) begin
     for (i3=48; i3<=63; i3=i3+1) begin
        lego0_q[i3] <= 0;
     end
    end
    else begin
     for (i3=48; i3<=63; i3=i3+1) begin
        lego0_q[i3] <= lego0foo_i[i3];
     end
    end
   end

   assign lego0  = lego0_q;

endmodule
